query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agenticsts: a bounded-memory testbed for long-horizon llm agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it proposes a foundational architectural framework (Continuum Memory Architecture) specifically designed to solve the "bounded-memory" and "long-horizon" challenges central to the user's question about extending the AgenticSTS testbed. It directly addresses the same mechanism (memory persistence and state management in LLM agents) and provides the canonical alternative approach to the RAG limitations that the user's research likely aims to investigate
